summary: iter209 testing complete: Echo Chat Bubble + Session Persistence, Tenant Config (White-label), Auto-register, CRM Tab Code-split. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features verified (100%).
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter209 features verified: (1) Echo Chat Bubble - floating bottom-right chat widget with data-testid='echo-chat-bubble', opens panel with quickstart chips (CCP status, What happened with..., Ticket status), sends messages via POST /api/echo/chat, shows user/assistant turns with intent detection. (2) Session Persistence - session_id stored in localStorage under 'echo_chat_session_id_v1', transcript restores via GET /api/echo/chat/history/{session_id}, 'New' button clears session. (3) Tenant Config - GET /api/tenant/config returns {ok, config:{name:'Luccca', brand_primary:'#c8a97e', features:{...}}, source:'env_defaults'|'mongo'}, PUT requires X-Admin-Token, CSS vars injected via WhiteLabelProvider (data-testid='white-label-root', data-tenant='default'). (4) Auto-register - backend logs show 'router.auto_register registered=4 skipped=190 errors=0', tenant_config.py routes accessible without server.py edits. (5) CRM Tab Code-split - React.lazy loads CrmTab.tsx, shows 'Loading CRM...' fallback briefly, Lifecycle Audit tab (data-testid='crm-tab-lifecycle') with summary cards, filter pills, rows. (6) Electron wrapper - /app/electron/main.js exists with valid syntax (scaffolding only, not wired to yarn scripts). (7) Regression tests passed: CRM forecast ML, lifecycle audit, echo-ai3 analyze-event, BEO finalize with gl_code and maestro_pushed.
